hook.headline: If you're seeing this, it's a sign from the  the universe to DM girls

reply.text: Crazy how you look like my next mistake and my best decision

messages.text: next mistake is crazy wording btw 😭
about that night, i mean you on the pavement like a life lesson
pavement is my therapist actually, zero co pay
therapist got you in a backless top and jeans
exposure therapy, literally my whole back exposed
youre trouble and i like it
they distressed from carrying my standards for men
you say that like it is new
bury me under that little handbag and vibes
this bag cost more than your last three choices 😭😭
i was literally about to dm you first
application requires three references and a risk waiver
reference one, i recognized pavement princess energy
ok but can you squat this low emotionally
